Poster: Treatment for Respiratory Viruses 
Dec. 22, 2025 
What to know 
Use this poster to highlight the benefits of timely antiviral treatment for respiratory viruses for those at high risk for severe illness. 
It could be helpful to post in healthcare clinics, health departments, or at community events. 
Format: PDF Dimensions: 8.5x11 in Page count: 1 Language: English (US) Size: 833 KB Length: Last updated: December 9, 2025
